title: Year 10 New Zealand Curriculum - Ministry of Education
content:
## Year 10 New Zealand Curriculum
Information to help you understand what your child will have learned by the end of their tenth year at school, and ideas on how to support their learning at home.
- Guide for the New Zealand Curriculum – Years 9 to 10
- Year 9 New Zealand Curriculum
- Year 10 New Zealand Curriculum English in Year 10 Mathematics and Statistics in Year 10 Health and Physical Education in Year 10 Science in Year 10 Technology in Year 10 Social Sciences in Year 10 The Arts in Year 10
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 10
- Health and Physical Education in Year 10
- Technology in Year 10
- Social Sciences in Year 10
We’re inviting parents and caregivers to share their feedback on the Parent Portal to help us improve the information and support we provide. Take a few minutes to complete our short survey.
Parent Portal survey – Survey Monkey

## By the end of Year 10 #
Knowing what your child is learning will help you support and guide them as they begin learning reading, writing and maths every day.
- English in Year 10 For English in Year 10, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading, and writing. Find out more
For English in Year 10, your child’s teacher will focus on oral language, reading, and writing.
- Mathematics and Statistics in Year 10 In Year 10, the focus is on helping children see themselves as part of a bigger world and encouraging them to develop greater independence. Find out more

### Mathematics and Statistics in Year 10
In Year 10, the focus is on helping children see themselves as part of a bigger world and encouraging them to develop greater independence.
- Health and Physical Education in Year 10 In Year 10, your child will learn about strategies for resilience, positive relationships, and safe communities, including protecting themselves. Find out more

### Health and Physical Education in Year 10
In Year 10, your child will learn about strategies for resilience, positive relationships, and safe communities, including protecting themselves.
- Science in Year 10 In Year 10, your teen deepens their understanding of areas such as chemical reactions, energy and disease, using advanced scientific vocabulary and conventions to communicate clearly and accurately. Find out more
In Year 10, your teen deepens their understanding of areas such as chemical reactions, energy and disease, using advanced scientific vocabulary and conventions to communicate clearly and accurately.
- Technology in Year 10 In Year 10, your child will focus on innovation and sustainability, preparing for complex projects involving a range of technologies and specialising in at least two technology strands. Find out more

### Technology in Year 10
In Year 10, your child will focus on innovation and sustainability, preparing for complex projects involving a range of technologies and specialising in at least two technology strands.
- Social Sciences in Year 10 In Year 10, your child will build on prior learning to engage with complex concepts related to political ideologies, governance systems, and human rights frameworks. Find out more

### Social Sciences in Year 10
In Year 10, your child will build on prior learning to engage with complex concepts related to political ideologies, governance systems, and human rights frameworks.
- The Arts in Year 10 In Year 10, your teen will start using advanced techniques to explore cultural historical, and social themes through art styles and their own artworks. Find out more
In Year 10, your teen will start using advanced techniques to explore cultural historical, and social themes through art styles and their own artworks.
